titleStmt.title: SII 34.249: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 249. Tiruvēngavāsal, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the first prākāra of the Vyāghrapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 10th year = A.D. 1226.

The trustees of the temple of Tiruvēngaivāyil-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Peruvāyil-nāḍu assigned some temple land as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna to a dancer (śāndikkūttaṉ) Araiyaṉ Oṉṟāyiram and another person with the stipulation that the latter should measure out to the temple a specified quantity of paddy annually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ cOṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiyatEvarkku yāṇṭu 10vatu jayaciṅkavaḷa
nāṭṭup peruvāyil nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvēṅkaivāyiluṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkōyilil taṉma cīkāriyamārāykiṉṟa Āti
caṇṭēcuvaratēvararuḷāl Ikkōyiltāṉattōm Iṉṉāṭṭuccāntikkūttaṉ Arayaṉ Oṉṟāyirattukku kuṭinīṅkāt tē
vatāṉamākak kalveṭṭikkuṭutta nīrnilamāvatu mayilāppūr vayalil Aṉantarāmaṉ vāykkālāl nīrpāyntu viḷaiyum
nāḷ vāram periya ceyyuṅ kiṇaṟṟañ ceyyumuṭpaṭṭa nilam mākāṇi Innilam mākāṇiyum Āṟañci Araṭṭaṉukku kuṭinīṅ
kāt tēvatāṉamāka kal veṭṭikkuṭutta nīrnilamāvatu palāṟṟu vāykkālāl nīrpāyntu viḷaiyum nāḷvāram
vēppañcey nilaṅkāṇi muntirikaik kīḻāṟu mākāṇiyum Āka nilam Orumāvaraiyē muntirikaik kīḻāṟu
mākkāṇikku ciyāṉ marakkālāl māttāl patiṉaiṅkalamāka pacāṉattukku Aḷakku nellu Irupattu mukkalane
Iru tūṇiyaṟunāḻi Āḻakkum payir koṇṭa nilattukku māttāl Eḻukalaṉē tūṇip patakkāka Aḷakkak kaṭavatākavum
ka kāl Oṉpataṉ kalaṉē tūṇi nāṉāḻi yāka Aḷappitākavum tiṉaikku māttāl Irukalam Aḷakka kaṭavatākavum varakukku māttāl mukkala maḷappatā
kavum Ippaṭiyāl vanta nellu kaṉ marakkālālēy tirumuṟṟap paṇṭārattilē yaḷa koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Eḷḷum payaṟum viḷai
ntāl talaipārttu Āṟil Oṉṟu koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum lōttuṅka cōḻa va potu Aṉupōkattu ttamā
Digital edition of SII 34.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
